# Blue Peek

> Blue Peek is a web design and AI automation studio based in Perth, Western Australia, servicing businesses across all of Australia. We build clean, professional, high-converting websites and smart lead-capture systems (including 24/7 AI chat assistants) for local and small businesses — built to get found on Google, look established, and turn visitors into enquiries.

## Key facts
- Business name: Blue Peek (also written "Bluepeek")
- Based in: Perth, Western Australia
- Services: all of Australia
- Contact: info@bluepeek.com.au
- Website: https://www.bluepeek.com.au
- Positioning: premium quality without big-agency prices; no lock-in contracts; clients own their domain, site and content; most websites go live in 1–2 weeks.

## Services
- Custom website design — mobile-first, fast, built to rank on Google and convert visitors into enquiries.
- AI & smart automation — 24/7 AI enquiry assistants, automated lead capture and follow-up, online booking systems.
- Local SEO & Google Ads — getting found when nearby customers search.
- Social media — consistent, brand-consistent content.

## Packages
- Starter — a professional website that makes a business look established.
- Growth (most popular) — website + 24/7 AI chatbot + automated lead capture and follow-up + local SEO.
- Scale — full site + advanced AI automation + lead pipeline/CRM setup.
Every package is custom-quoted. No lock-in, no hidden fees.

- Superior Garage (auto workshop, Malaga WA) — https://superiorgarage.com.au

## Contact
Email info@bluepeek.com.au for a free, no-obligation quote. Blue Peek replies within one business day.
